text.title: rust-testing-ci-toolchain Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the project meet the applies-if preconditions (integration_tests_count, unsafe_or_ffi_present)?

conclusion.verdict: enable miri job + nextest + llvm-cov per r1, r2, r3
nextest + llvm-cov per r1, r2; skip miri job

example.trace: integration_tests_count=12 → unsafe_or_ffi_present=true → enable miri + nextest + llvm-cov per r1, r2, r3
